message:
fix(lint): use lazy useState initializer for OS detection

Replace useEffect-based OS detection with lazy useState initializer
to comply with react-hooks/set-state-in-effect lint rule.

Changes:
- keyboard-shortcuts-modal.tsx: Initialize modifier key via lazy fn
- site-header.tsx: Initialize metaKey via lazy fn

Both components detect Mac/non-Mac platform for showing ⌘ vs Ctrl.
Using lazy initializer is the correct pattern for this - it runs
once during initial render without causing cascading re-renders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
